title: Vietnamese Beef and Tam Com Bowl
description: A keto-friendly Vietnamese-inspired bowl featuring grilled beef, crispy tam, and a side of com. This dish is perfect for a low-carb diet.

ingredients.name: Grass-fed beef strips
ingredients.notes: Slice into thin strips for easy grilling

ingredients.name: Tam
ingredients.notes: Crispy fried tam for added crunch

instructions: Season the beef strips with salt, pepper, and Vietnamese chili flakes.
Grill the beef for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked to your liking.
While the beef is grilling, heat the coconut oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the tam to the pan and cook until crispy, stirring frequently.
Serve the grilled beef on top of a bed of com, with crispy tam on the side.
Drizzle with fatty fish sauce and garnish with fresh herbs, if desired.
